LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JACOB DROHAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE COURT ACCEPTS THE SWORN DECLARATION OF THE REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER, SO THE EVIDENCE ESTABLISHES PROPER SUBSTITUTE SERVICE. THE COURT CANNOT GRANT RELIEF UNDER CCP SECTION 473.5 BECAUSE DEFENDANT DID NOT ATTACH A PROPOSED ANSWER AS REQUIRED BY SECTION 473.5 (B). PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
